calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Jul-31-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Jul-26-2018 Continued To Oct-25-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Amy Shearer, Assistant District Attorney, appearing for Plaintiff PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, Telephone 415-553-9706;
No other appearance.

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S unopposed motion for terminating sanctions striking the claim of Daniel Egeland is is continued to October 25, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. dept. 302 pursuant to the request of the moving party.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar May-17-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Amy Shearer, Assistant District Attorney 415-553-9706 of the SF District Attorney's Office for the PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: Dianne Peebles, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
